prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第49名，较2021年第51名、2025年第52名稳步上升，近年排名持续提升，体现学校综合实力增强；2023年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第94位（一般），综合热度176307，短视频曝光量处于中低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录为低关注（2023年有考生因分数线波动被录取），无严重断档信号；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，均为该校王牌学科；与招生专业中的交通运输类、土木工程等高度对应，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业热度持续高位；土木建筑热度低迷；安徽省2026年考生总数451000人，按近年物理类占比约70%估算约315700人，较2025年320779人减少约1.6%，考生规模小幅缩减缓解竞争，2025年物理类本科批461分，近年稳定；西南交通大学位于四川省成都市，非本省高校；安徽省考生对省外211高校报考意愿稳定；该校在安徽省物理类招生规模较大（约148-153人），属于该校在省外的主要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15094名、2026年扩招3.4%、安徽省物理类考生减少约1.6%（竞争略缓解）、土木建筑劝退但交通运输A+及计算机/电子信息等热门专业吸引力强等因素，预计2026年最低位次较，预测最低位次约15350名，区间14850–15850名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12628 → 13364 → 13531 → 15828 → 15094, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, due to the adjustment of new college entrance examination subject selection (Physics + Chemistry), there was a significant backward jump to 15828, and in 2025 it rebounded to 15094, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2466 places over the past 5 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 15094. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 146 in 2021, 147 in 2022, 143 in 2023, 148 in 2024, and 148 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 153, an increase of 5 students (+3.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition and puts upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 49th, up from 51st in 2021 and 52nd in 2025, with a steady improvement in recent years, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation in 2023 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of 176307, and short video exposure is at a medium-low level, with no obvious signs of increased application attention; historical abnormal admission records are low attention (in 2023, some candidates were admitted due to score line fluctuations), with no serious gaps; Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), and Civil Engineering is A, both are the university's flagship disciplines; they highly correspond to the transportation, civil engineering, and other majors in the enrollment plan, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high popularity; Civil Engineering and Architecture have low popularity; in 2026, the total number of candidates in Anhui Province is 451,000, with an estimated 315,700 in the Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 70%, a decrease of about 1.6% from 320,779 in 2025, which slightly eases competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score is 461 points, stable in recent years; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not a local university; Anhui candidates have stable willingness to apply to 211 universities outside the province; the university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Anhui Province (about 148-153 students), making it one of the main source provinces outside the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15094, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 3.4%, the decrease in Anhui Physics Category candidates by about 1.6% (slightly easing competition), the discouragement of Civil Engineering and Architecture but the strong appeal of Transportation A+ and popular majors like Computer Science/Electronic Information, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 15350, with a range of 14850–15850.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Transportation (including Transportation, Traffic Engineering)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (including Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Communication Engineering
- Artificial Intelligence
- Data Science and Big Data Technology
- Vehicle Engineering
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Surveying and Mapping (including Surveying Engineering, Remote Sensing Science and Technology, etc.)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (including Environmental Engineering, Fire Protection Engineering)
- Business Administration (including Information Management and Information Systems, Business Administration, Accounting, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14850–15850, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Transportation, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<14850), focus on impacting Tier 1 popular majors like Transportation (A+) and Computer Science; for rankings near the upper limit (>15850), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Civil Engineering (A discipline but low popularity) as safety, while also considering Tier 2 moderate-difficulty majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2423 → 2550 → 2727 → 3171 → 3449, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1026 places over the past 5 years; after the 2024 new college entrance examination reform, the ranking shifted significantly backward (3171), and continued to shift backward to 3449 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 278 places over the past 2 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3449; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Anhui Province was 13 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 19 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 19, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 49th, with steadily rising rankings in recent years and continuously enhanced comprehensive strength; the 2023 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of 176307, and short video exposure at a medium-low level; historical admission anomaly records are low concern, with no serious gap signals; Transportation Engineering is A+, Civil Engineering is A (both science and engineering disciplines), and the liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Foreign Languages and Literatures, etc.) do not directly correspond to the university's advantageous disciplines, but the overall 211 level of the university still attracts liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are steadily popular; Journalism and Communication is sluggish; Teacher Training/Education is polarized; in 2026, the total number of examinees in Anhui Province is 451,000, with an estimated 135,300 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 30%, a decrease of about 6,100 (-4.3%) compared to 141,400 in 2025, easing competition due to the reduction in examinee numbers; the 2025 history category undergraduate batch score is 477, stable in recent years; Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, not a local university; the university's enrollment scale for liberal arts/history category in Anhui Province is relatively small (about 19), making it a small-scale enrollment category for the university outside its province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3449, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a decrease of about 4.3% in history category examinees in Anhui Province (significantly easing competition), and the polarization of liberal arts major popularity (Law/Chinese Language and Literature are hot, Journalism and Communication is discouraged), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly forward compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 3419, and a range of 2919–3919.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Ideological and Political Education.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Journalism and Communication (including Communication Studies, Advertising)
- Public Administration
- Political Science and Public Administration.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2919–3919, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main target, aim for Tier 1 Law/Chinese Language and Literature as a stretch, and use Tier 3 foreign language majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2919), you can focus on aiming for Law and Chinese Language and Literature; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>3919), it is recommended to use Tier 3 foreign language majors as a safety net. Southwest Jiaotong University is a science and engineering institution with a limited number of liberal arts majors, so attention should be paid to the selection space of majors when applying.
